turns.text: Thanks for calling Sears Home Services — what appliance can I help you with today?
Hi, my hvac is acting up.
Got it — a hvac. What's the brand and model, and what's happening?
Thanks. Can you tell me more about what's happening and when it started?
The thermostat schedule isn't holding the set temperature, since the weekend.
Understood, and any error codes or unusual sounds?
No error code or unusual sound, just that.
Here's what I'd try: double check the hvac isn't overloaded and the settings match the load, then run a quick cycle to confirm the fix worked.
Happy to help — call back anytime if it's still acting up!

symptoms.description: the thermostat schedule isn't holding the set temperature

steps_given: Double check the hvac isn't overloaded and the settings match the load.
Run a quick diagnostic cycle to confirm the fix worked.
